problem.title: Guess Number Higher or Lower
problem.description: We are playing the Guess Game. The game is as follows:

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Binary Search
solutions.description: Apply binary search over the range [1, n], calling the provided guess() API at each midpoint to determine whether to move left or right. The API returns 0 (correct), 1 (too low), or -1 (too high), directly driving the binary search direction. The key insight is that the search space halves with every call, guaranteeing O(log n) total guesses.
